findings.summary: Crystal frequency correctly reported as null when value field contains a symbol name
findings.details: Y1 has Value='Crystal_GND24_Small' (a KiCad symbol name, not a frequency). The analyzer correctly reports frequency=null. Load caps C5 and C1 (both 5pF) are identified.

findings.summary: Addressable LED chains correctly detected: SK6812MINI-E (3) and WS2812B (2) chains identified separately
findings.details: The analyzer correctly identifies two distinct chains with appropriate protocol, correct chain lengths (3 and 2), and current estimates (180mA and 120mA).

findings.summary: USB-C VBUS compliance failures correctly flagged: no decoupling cap and no TVS
findings.details: VBUS_ connects only to J2 (USB-C) and FB1 (ferrite bead). No decoupling capacitor or TVS on VBUS_. The USB compliance checker correctly reports vbus_esd_protection=fail and vbus_decoupling=fail.
